product_highlights: Capixyl™ — clinically validated hair growth biomimetic peptide with red clover extract
Specialty lipid actives for scalp penetration
Hair care delivery systems for enhanced follicle bioavailability
notes: Lucas Meyer Cosmetics (part of Clariant) is a French cosmetic active ingredient specialist with a strong portfolio of hair and scalp care actives. As a distributor of Capixyl™, they provide one of the most clinically validated hair growth actives on the market. Capixyl™ combines a biomimetic peptide with red clover extract rich in biochanin A for comprehensive hair growth support. Their lipid-based delivery systems enhance the penetration and efficacy of hair care actives into the scalp and hair follicle.
